== Notes for [[Item:Q102964|Q102964]] ==

The family surname of her spouse is De Saporta (or variant thereof); over time the first name of Benveniste has been applied as the surname of the lineage, see: https://www.academia.edu/7867357/El_testamento_de_Benvenist_de_Saporta_1268_

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000103185426266

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
